violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. - Raw onions found on floor in kitchen.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. - Saniti Bucket found above 400ppm QT, using steramine tabs, 1 tab per half bucket of water.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. - Under prep table lid found dirty.
Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitizer solution for three compartment sink was not maintained at the proper concentration - 3 comp sink found at 400ppm PLUS.
Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. - Test strips needed for Quat.

Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 41F or below during display or service. -Items found in ice table at 43-46F. Staff moved/added more ice.
